---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for BlueLock Crypto Tracking
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A brief description of the feature you're requesting.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature in detail. How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Privacy Considerations
Does this feature require any external connections, accounts, or data sharing?
If yes, please explain what data would leave the user's machine and why it's necessary.

## Additional Context
Mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other tools.

---
> **Blue Lock Systems LLC Principles:**  
> Features that require mandatory cloud services, user accounts, or telemetry will not be accepted.  
> Privacy-first, self-hosted, and open-source are non-negotiable.
